_doc: Canonical fixer-lane routing for every readiness check. See FIXER_LANES.md. Lanes: code (design-build) | config (config-fixer) | operator-input (you supply/decide). 'needs' = a secondary dependency that must also be satisfied (shown on the card so it's never silently green). 'instructions' = what the card must tell the operator for operator-input findings (the golden rule).

P1.note: MVP live link — design-build rebuild + deploy makes it 200

P2.note: named distributor marker — planted from card spec

P4.note: remove scale-infra pre-GO; or waive if intentional

24.note: page is code; magic-link DELIVERY needs email infra

25.note: auth smoke-test depends on email delivery

34.instructions: Provide a Mapbox access token (BYOK). Get one at https://account.mapbox.com/access-tokens/ — paste it so it's stored sensitive; the machine validates it with a geocode test before passing.

35.instructions: Email infra: supply RESEND_API_KEY (https://resend.com/api-keys) and verify the updates.corporateaisolutions.com sending domain DNS in Resend. The config-fixer then sets Supabase SMTP + templates and sends a test.

37.note: feature-manifest file is code; preflight run is a process step

38.note: product-specific migrations/RLS belong in the repo (applied on deploy)

40.note: Vercel env: secrets sensitive, prod+preview only, no development

VT_A5.instructions: Sign Out Everywhere is destructive — verify it by hand and record the result (status pass|fail, source operator). The agent never clicks it (§9.5).

VT_A6.instructions: Delete Account is destructive — verify it by hand and record the result (status pass|fail, source operator). The agent never clicks it (§9.5).

VT_C1.note: signup confirmation email depends on email infra

VT_C3.note: reset email depends on email infra

VT_C4.note: magic-link delivery depends on email infra

VT_D7.instructions: All mail from noreply@updates.corporateaisolutions.com — needs the Resend sending-domain DNS verified (operator) before the config-fixer can complete.
